title: Functions, Transformations, Inverses, and Composition · Model Lens: Function Transform
summary: Model sensor calibration and reversible conversions across representations. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math int function transform increment in a calibration and conversion library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Predict how translations, scaling, reflection, and composition change a model.
Define function domain, codomain, range, units, and practical interpretation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
